mempalace_add_drawer.description: File verbatim content into the palace. Checks for duplicates first.

content.description: Verbatim content to store — exact words, never summarized

mempalace_check_duplicate.description: Check if content already exists in the palace before filing

mempalace_delete_drawer.description: Delete a drawer by ID. Irreversible.

drawer_id.description: ID of the drawer to delete

mempalace_diary_read.description: Read your recent diary entries (in AAAK). See what past versions of yourself recorded — your journal across sessions.

agent_name.description: Your name — each agent gets their own diary wing

last_n.description: Number of recent entries to read (default: 10)

mempalace_diary_write.description: Write to your personal agent diary in AAAK format. Your observations, thoughts, what you worked on, what matters. Each agent has their own diary with full history. Write in AAAK for compression — e.g. 'SESSION:2026-04-04|built.palace.graph+diary.tools|ALC.req:agent.diaries.in.aaak|★★★'. Use entity codes from the AAAK spec.

agent_name.description: Your name — each agent gets their own diary wing

entry.description: Your diary entry in AAAK format — compressed, entity-coded, emotion-marked

mempalace_find_tunnels.description: Find rooms that bridge two wings — the hallways connecting different domains. E.g. what topics connect wing_code to wing_team?

mempalace_get_aaak_spec.description: Get the AAAK dialect specification — the compressed memory format MemPalace uses. Call this if you need to read or write AAAK-compressed memories.

mempalace_get_taxonomy.description: Full taxonomy: wing → room → drawer count

mempalace_graph_stats.description: Palace graph overview: total rooms, tunnel connections, edges between wings.

mempalace_kg_add.description: Add a fact to the knowledge graph. Subject → predicate → object with optional time window. E.g. ('Max', 'started_school', 'Year 7', valid_from='2026-09-01').

source_closet.description: Closet ID where this fact appears (optional)

mempalace_kg_invalidate.description: Mark a fact as no longer true. E.g. ankle injury resolved, job ended, moved house.

ended.description: When it stopped being true (YYYY-MM-DD, default: today)

mempalace_kg_query.description: Query the knowledge graph for an entity's relationships. Returns typed facts with temporal validity. E.g. 'Max' → child_of Alice, loves chess, does swimming. Filter by date with as_of to see what was true at a point in time.

as_of.description: Date filter — only facts valid at this date (YYYY-MM-DD, optional)

mempalace_kg_stats.description: Knowledge graph overview: entities, triples, current vs expired facts, relationship types.

mempalace_kg_timeline.description: Chronological timeline of facts. Shows the story of an entity (or everything) in order.

entity.description: Entity to get timeline for (optional — omit for full timeline)

mempalace_list_rooms.description: List rooms within a wing (or all rooms if no wing given)

mempalace_list_wings.description: List all wings with drawer counts

mempalace_search.description: Semantic search. Returns verbatim drawer content with similarity scores.

mempalace_status.description: Palace overview — total drawers, wing and room counts

mempalace_traverse.description: Walk the palace graph from a room. Shows connected ideas across wings — the tunnels. Like following a thread through the palace: start at 'chromadb-setup' in wing_code, discover it connects to wing_myproject (planning) and wing_user (feelings about it).
